title: Soos Pynappel op Pizza
overview: Waldo and Becca have exactly three things in common. Both are chefs. Both are single. And both dislike each other equally.  When they end up at a crazy singles retreat in the mountains, fate throws them together in one absurd scenario after another. This forces them to reconsider their opinions on love.
